ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-20-2015 CONTINUED TO DEC-22-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST KEYHAN MOHANNA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUL-14-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-29-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST KEYHAN MOHANNA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-20-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-06-2015. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST KEYHAN MOHANNA FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-22-2015, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-07-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-14-2015 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-14-2015 CONTINUED TO OCT-20-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-22-2016 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. GOVERNMENT CODE 68608(B). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-22-2015 CONTINUED TO MAR-22-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S); PAY OUTSTANDING SANCTIONS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Off Calendar Mar-24-2016 Dismissal
